phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o Cartão Évora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN EH-voo-ruh?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Évora Card
phrases.text_local: Onde se pode comprar o Cartão Évora aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH PAW-dih koomp-RAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN EH-voo-ruh uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: The Évora Card offers discounted access to museums and monuments, purchased directly at the information desk.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão principal à sua frente.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the main counter in front of you.

responses.english: Good morning, at the main counter in front of you.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL AH SOOUH FRAYNG-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão principal à sua frente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate parking voucher
phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o talão de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW tuh-LOWN DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking validation is self-service via a machine to speed up visitor flow during peak hours.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where wine route brochures are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as brochuras da rota dos vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH broo-SHOO-ruhsh DUH RAW-tuh DOOSH VEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Wine tourism materials are grouped together to promote local vineyard visits and tastings.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, estão no expositor de brochuras.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH broo-SHOO-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are on the brochure display stand.

responses.english: Good morning, they are on the brochure display stand.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN NOO ehsh-poo-zee-TOHR DIH broo-SHOO-ruhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, estão no expositor de brochuras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Évora Card
phrases.cultural_note: The Évora Card offers discounts on attractions and public transport.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão do Cartão Évora.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN EH-voo-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Évora Card counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Évora Card counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN EH-voo-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão do Cartão Évora.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for guided tours
phrases.text_local: Onde efetuo o pagamento dos tours guiados?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ee-fih-TOOOO AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too DOOSH TOHW-ruhsh GEEAH-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tour payments are processed separately at the dedicated till to manage group bookings efficiently.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Wine Route brochures are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as brochuras da Rota dos Vinhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH broo-SHOO-ruhsh DUH RAW-tuh DOOSH VEE-nyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist offices typically organize brochures by region or theme on designated racks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pode pedir ao técnico de turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih pih-DEER OW TEHK-nee-koo DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, you can ask the tourism technician.

responses.english: Good morning, you can ask the tourism technician.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PAW-dih pih-DEER OW TEHK-nee-koo DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.french: Bom dia, pode pedir ao técnico de turismo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where trail map panel is
phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o painel com os mapas dos trilhos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW peye-NEHL KOHM OOSH MAH-puhsh DOOSH TREE-lyoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Trail panels are positioned for quick reference, catering to hikers planning routes through the Alentejo landscape.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fale com um dos nossos rececionistas. Ele poderá indicar-lhe onde está o painel.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FAH-lih KOHM OONNG DOOSH NAW-soosh reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuhsh. EH-lih poh-deh-RAH een-dee-KAHR-LYIH OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW peye-NEHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, speak with one of our receptionists. They can tell you where the panel is.

responses.english: Good morning, speak with one of our receptionists. They can tell you where the panel is.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FAH-lih KOHM OONNG DOOSH NAW-soosh reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuhsh. EH-lih poh-deh-RAH een-dee-KAHR-LYIH OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW peye-NEHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, fale com um dos nossos rececionistas. Ele poderá indicar-lhe onde está o painel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the trail map wall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mapa mural de trilhos?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah oo MAH-pah moo-RAW doosh TREE-lyoosh peh-JIS-trees
phrases.cultural_note: Hiking maps are often displayed prominently to assist independent travelers navigating rural Alentejo paths.

likely_response.local: Está na parede, perto do balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih, PEHR-too DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: It is on the wall, near the information counter.

responses.english: It is on the wall, near the information counter.
responses.phonetic: ehs-TAH NUH puh-REH-dih, PEHR-too DOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Está na parede, perto do balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate parking voucher
phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o voucher de estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW voow-SHEHR DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese tourist offices, it is standard to greet staff with 'Bom dia' and ask at the main counter for services like parking voucher validation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the information counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de informações.
